title: FLOW_PRESSURE_REPORT
description: Flow pressure test output. All fields must be PASS for the changeset to proceed. Any FAIL field blocks routing. No advisory classification permitted.

work_packet_id.description: References the WORK_PACKET that triggered this pressure test.

changeset_id.description: References the CHANGESET being pressure tested.

ingress_contract_exists.description: Every declared ingress surface has an explicit contract. No implicit ingress.

egress_contract_exists.description: Every declared egress surface has an explicit contract. No implicit egress.

no_orphan_tables.description: No table exists without a consuming process or declared egress. No dead-end data.

no_unconsumed_events.description: Every event produced by a process has at least one declared consumer. No fire-and-forget.

id_propagation_intact.description: Sovereign IDs propagate through ingress → middle → egress without mutation or loss.
